name: White Plains Beach
tagline: A former military beach now open to the public — wide sand, consistent beginner waves, and no Waikiki crowds.
parking: Large free lot; ample parking even on weekends
bestTime: Morning for glassy surf conditions; year-round for consistent small waves
talkStory: This used to be restricted to military personnel but is now fully open — and it's one of the best beginner surf spots on the island. The waves are small and consistent, the beach is wide, and there's actual parking. Board rentals are available right at the beach. Way less hectic than learning at Waikiki. The water is clean, the sand is soft, and it never feels crowded. A seriously underrated spot.
